title: Reproducibility Companion for Current-Weighted Localization and Dynamic Spectral Spacing in a Certified Counterexample to the Dissipation–Coherence Conjecture
description: Exact numerical certificates, causal spectral analysis, Lean 4 formalization, independent clean-build audit, manuscript source, and cryptographic manifests supporting a certified 12-state counterexample to the unrestricted Oberreiter–Barato–Seifert dissipation–coherence conjecture. The symbolic theorem layer is machine-checked in Lean 4; witness-specific spectrum and causal-window claims are supported by exact and validated numerical certificates.
